beats: Lyria hands Aric a cup of field tea.

scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: If you stare at that fire any harder, it will surrender.

scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: No. You are brooding. Different posture.

scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: Do you ever stop making light of things?

scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: Only when the dark is winning.
